title: Colorado Ranger
writer: E.B. Mann, Ron Ormond, Maurice Tombragel
actors: James Ellison, Russell Hayden, Raymond Hatton
plot: Shamrock, Lucky, and the Colonel arrive in Cactus Junction where they are given badges by the Sheriff and offered money by Morgan to drive the ranchers off the land. Instead they bring in the outlaw Loco Joe and two of his henchme...
